privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At DENTIX, we are committed to protecting your privacy and your patients' data.

1.title: 1. Data Collection
1.intro: We collect necessary data to provide our services, including:

3.title: 3. Data Security
3.intro: We implement strict technical measures, including:

4.title: 4. Data Usage
4.alert: Important: We do not share or sell patient data to third parties for marketing.

5.title: 5. Third-Party Sharing
5.content: We may use technical service providers (like hosting) who strictly adhere to data protection.

6.title: 6. Data Retention
6.content: We retain data for the duration of the subscription.

7.title: 7. User Rights
7.intro: As a clinic owner/manager, you have the right to:

8.title: 8. Breach Notification
8.content: In case of a security breach, affected clinics will be notified immediately.

9.title: 9. Cookies
9.intro: We use cookies solely for operational purposes:
9.outro: We do not use advertising tracking cookies.

10.title: 10. Policy Amendments
10.content: We reserve the right to amend this policy when necessary.

11.title: 11. Contact
11.content: For privacy inquiries, please contact us via official channels.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using DENTIX, you acknowledge reading and agreeing to these terms entirely.

1.title: 1. System Definition
1.content: DENTIX is a medical management SaaS used exclusively for legitimate purposes.

2.title: 2. Account Security
items: Users are responsible for login confidentiality.
Notify us immediately of unauthorized use.

3.title: 3. Data Responsibility
items: Clinic is responsible for data accuracy.

5.title: 5. Subscriptions & Payments
items: Service may be suspended for late payment.

6.title: 6. Liability Limits
6.content: The system is an administrative tool only. The doctor is fully responsible for diagnosis and treatment.

7.title: 7. Service Availability
7.intro: We strive for high availability, however:
items: We are not liable for uncontrollable outages.

8.title: 8. Force Majeure
8.intro: We are not liable for uncontrolled circumstances like:

9.title: 9. Termination
9.intro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts for:

10.title: 10. Amendments
10.content: We may amend these terms at any time.

11.title: 11. Governing Law
11.content: These terms are governed by local laws.

smart_learning.help_desc: Consumption is distributed based on relative weight. (e.g. Class II weighs 2x Class I)

ai_chat.title: Smart Assistant
ai_chat.subtitle: Smart Dent AI - 🎤 Voice + Text
ai_chat.welcome_message:
Hello! 👋 I am your smart assistant. I can help you with:
• Searching patient files
• Check accounts
• Show appointments
• 🎙️ **Medical Scribe Mode** - Speak during treatment and I'll record details

🎤 Type or press mic to speak
